name: Stuffed Meat Loaf I
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Mozzarella, cut into four pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except mozzarella thoroughly.
2. Form the mixture into a firmly packed football shape.
3. Make a deep lengthwise slit in the meat loaf and stuff with mozzarella.
4. Close the meat loaf firmly around the cheese.
5. Heat oil in a large frying pan.
6. Brown the meat loaf on all sides.
7. Gently lift out the meat loaf and place it in simmering tomato sauce.
8. Cook slowly for 30-45 minutes on low heat.
9. Serve sliced with pasta or rice.
